failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the ProductCatalogSearch results and selected the last, most expensive listed kettle instead of the first and cheapest listed kettle.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and showed the items sorted by ascending price. The first item, item_id 1240311797, had the lowest price at $137.17. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item_id 2243454707 at $164.46 was the cheapest, which contradicts the tool output. This is a reasoning error over available tool output, not a malformed invocation, missing information, or unsupported intent.
